title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the core CLI and server for running large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama, enabling programmatic chat, generate, and embedding calls.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node.js and browsers to interact with the Ollama API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package adding Ollama chat, embedding, and tool-calling components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama with multi-model chat, file uploads, and role management.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama providing sync/async APIs and model management.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight wrapper adding interactive prompts, conversation history, and prompt templates to the ollama CLI.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement for inline code completion.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by Ollama, providing Generator and ChatGenerator nodes for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Community Camunda 8 connector that invokes Ollama models inside BPMN processes for AI tasks.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings Ollama models into any server with slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama and popular models for reproducible deployments on Linux/macOS.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and PVC model caching.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration that exposes Ollama models via app mentions or dedicated channels.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module for CI/CD pipelines that pulls and tests Ollama models inside containerized environments.

title: Ollama Reddit Community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing models, troubleshooting, and showcasing projects built on Ollama.

title: Ollama on Hacker News
summary: Discussion thread covering Ollama v0.1.30 release with tool-use support and performance improvements.
